title: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 03 Pharmacist and Other Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 03 Data Entry Operators, Pharmacist, and Nursing Officer, Technician Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Any Degree, GNM, B.Sc Nursing, B.Pharm, and B.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 . Herewe included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, application fee, and how to apply for these ...
